description: Rapid Neural Designer - Saved Model Library

models.name: CNN Classifier
models.description: Conv2D(1->32->64) + MaxPool + FC for 28x28 image classification

models.name: RNN Classifier
models.description: Embedding + RNN(128->256) + Linear for sequence classification

models.name: GAT Node Classifier
models.description: 2-layer GAT (64->64->16, 4 heads) for graph node classification

models.name: LLaDA Diffusion LM
models.description: 4-layer LLaDA diffusion transformer (dim=256, 4 heads, bidirectional attention, 32k vocab)

models.name: Mamba SSM
models.description: 6-layer Mamba state space model (dim=256, state_dim=16, expand=2, 32k vocab)

models.name: Qwen2.5-style LM
models.description: 4-layer Qwen2.5 transformer (dim=256, 8 query/2 KV heads GQA, 32k vocab)

models.name: Liquid Neural Network
models.description: 4-layer Liquid Time-Constant cells (dim=128, ODE steps=6, 10k vocab)

models.name: Mixtral MoE
models.description: 4-layer MoE transformer (dim=256, 4 heads, 8 experts top-2, 32k vocab)
